# crash

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Crash report kind: browser crash collector and the Debug → Reports summary view. Crash report kind: validates crash payloads, fingerprints by error + stack, and renders per-crash tasks.
- Web:
  - Contributes:
    - `Core.Root` → `CrashCollector`
    - `Reports.KindView` → `CrashSummary`
  - Uses:
    - `infra/health.wedgeReportSink`
    - `primitives/error-boundary.boundaryReportSink`
    - `reports.report`
    - `reports.Reports`
- Server:
  - Contributes: `report-kind` "crash"
  - Uses:
    - `build/server-build-id.getServerBuildId`
    - `reports.ReportKind`
- Core:
  - Exports (types): `CrashPayload`
  - Exports (values):
    - `crashFingerprint`
    - `CrashPayloadSchema`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
